title: bouncy uruguayan tomatoes hash
description: a delicious, paleo-friendly dish featuring chopped tomatoes with a satisfying crunch and a touch of Uruguayan flair, perfect for a weekend brunch.
instructions: heat the avocado oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
add the diced bacon and cook until crispy, about 5 minutes.
remove the bacon from the skillet and set aside.
add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
add the diced red bell pepper and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
add the chopped tomatoes, salt, and black pepper to the skillet.
stir to combine and cook for 5-7 minutes, until the tomatoes are tender but still slightly firm.
stir in the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
serve the hash hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
crumble the cooked bacon on top, if desired.
